response.step_by_step_log:
1. Identified song title as "Alien Alien" by listening to the audio and matching it against common Vocaloid songs.
2. Verified the original artist is NayutalieN.
3. Searched for '"Alien Alien" NayutalieN Japanese and English lyrics'.
4. Extracted full Japanese and English lyrics from the search results.
5. Defined the video as a single continuous scene since it is a single performance.
response.global_summary: A performance of the song "Alien Alien" by the Hololive Gamers members (Shirakami Fubuki, Ookami Mio, Nekomata Okayu, and Inugami Korone).

scenes.description: The four Hololive Gamers perform the song "Alien Alien" on stage.
scenes.song_title: Alien Alien (エイリアンエイリアン)
scenes.performer_in_video: Hololive Gamers (Shirakami Fubuki, Ookami Mio, Nekomata Okayu, Inugami Korone)
scenes.reference_lyrics_og:
揺れる街灯 篠突く雨
振れる感情 感覚のテレパス
迷子のふたりはコンタクト
ココロは恋を知りました

タイトロープ ツギハギの制服
重度のディスコミュニケーション
眼光赤色にキラキラ
何かが送る胸騒ぎ

ALIEN 私ALIEN
あなたのココロを惑わせる
混ざり合う宇宙の引力で
感じてる気持ちはトキメキ

ALIEN あなたのALIEN
惹きあうココロは逃げられない
あなたに未体験あげる
異世界の果てまでトキメキ・スキ
scenes.reference_lyrics_en:
The trembling streetlights, the pelting rain
My wavering feelings, an emotional telepath
The lost two make contact
And my heart learned of love

Tight rope, a patchwork uniform
A severe discommunication
A glint in my eyes, twinkling red
It feels like something’s gonna happen; a premonition

Alien, I'm an alien
Leading astray your heart
With the melding gravity of the universe
The feeling I felt; my throbbing heart

Alien, I'm your alien
Your heart pulling against mine can't run away
I'll give you an un-experience
To the ends of the other world, throbbing, I like you
